title: Manage natural areas on a rural property
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage natural areas on a rural property demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine location, size and type of area to be managed

pcs.text: Confirm location, boundaries and ownership of rural property
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm location, boundaries and ownership of rural property?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm location, boundaries and ownership of rural property.

pcs.text: Compile register of native animal and plant species specific to locality
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Compile register of native animal and plant species specific to locality?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Compile register of native animal and plant species specific to locality.

pcs.text: Determine features, characteristics and topography of site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine features, characteristics and topography of site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine features, characteristics and topography of site.

pcs.text: Identify and confirm accuracy of vegetation association and conservation value data
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and confirm accuracy of vegetation association and conservation value data?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and confirm accuracy of vegetation association and conservation value data.

pcs.text: Obtain details of the presence of and threats from weeds and pests
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain details of the presence of and threats from weeds and pests?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain details of the presence of and threats from weeds and pests.

pcs.text: Assess ecological value of natural areas on property
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess ecological value of natural areas on property?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess ecological value of natural areas on property.

pcs.text: Compile documented evidence of physical impacts on area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Compile documented evidence of physical impacts on area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Compile documented evidence of physical impacts on area.

pcs.text: Assess the ecological context of the site in the wider region
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess the ecological context of the site in the wider region?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the ecological context of the site in the wider region.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Determine location, size and type of area to be managed

elements.title: Prepare management strategies

pcs.text: Identify budgetary constraints for management strategies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify budgetary constraints for management strategies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify budgetary constraints for management strategies.

pcs.text: Design boundary control appropriate to natural area protection guidelines
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Design boundary control appropriate to natural area protection guidelines?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Design boundary control appropriate to natural area protection guidelines.

pcs.text: Develop management strategies according to budget requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop management strategies according to budget requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop management strategies according to budget requirements.

pcs.text: Liaise with planning and specialist authorities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Liaise with planning and specialist authorities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Liaise with planning and specialist authorities.

pcs.text: Identify habitat enhancement strategies within regional biodiversity context
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify habitat enhancement strategies within regional biodiversity context?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify habitat enhancement strategies within regional biodiversity context.

pcs.text: Develop strategies to integrate management of natural areas into land use and production systems for property
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop strategies to integrate management of natural areas into land use and production systems for property?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop strategies to integrate management of natural areas into land use and production systems for property.

pcs.text: Incorporate biosecurity, environmental sustainability and workplace health and safety procedures into management plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Incorporate biosecurity, environmental sustainability and workplace health and safety procedures into management plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Incorporate biosecurity, environmental sustainability and workplace health and safety procedures into management plan.

pcs.text: Confirm management plan complies with relevant national, state, territory and local legislation or regulations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm management plan complies with relevant national, state, territory and local legislation or regulations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm management plan complies with relevant national, state, territory and local legislation or regulations.

pcs.text: Prepare and present management plan to stakeholders
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare and present management plan to stakeholders?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare and present management plan to stakeholders.
